system: RNDS — Rede Nacional de Dados em Saúde

authentication.protocol: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials with Mutual TLS (mTLS)

tls.clientCertificate: ICP-Brasil e-CNPJ certificate (A1 software or A3 hardware token)
tls.trustStore: ICP-Brasil root CA chain (available from ITI: https://www.gov.br/iti/)

401.action: Renew e-CNPJ certificate, verify certificate chain

tokenManagement.storage: Server-side only. NEVER expose to client. Encrypt at rest with encryptPHIWithVersion.
tokenManagement.refresh: Token expires in 1800s (30 min). Refresh 60s before expiry. No refresh_token — re-authenticate.
tokenManagement.caching: Cache token in memory or Redis with TTL = expires_in - 60

rateLimits.note: Limits may vary by establishment size. Contact DATASUS for increases.

credentialingSteps: 1. Register establishment in CNES (Cadastro Nacional de Estabelecimentos de Saúde) if not already
2. Obtain e-CNPJ certificate (ICP-Brasil A1 or A3) for the establishment's CNPJ
3. Access SCPA (Sistema de Controle de Permissão de Acesso) at servicos-datasus.saude.gov.br
4. Register the software system (HoliLabs) in RNDS portal
5. Configure homologação environment with test certificate
6. Complete integration tests against sandbox: submit Bundle, retrieve Patient by CNS
7. Submit homologação results to DATASUS for review
8. Upon approval, receive production credentials and API access

environmentVariables.RNDS_ENABLED: true | false — feature flag for all RNDS operations
environmentVariables.RNDS_CERT_PEM: Path to e-CNPJ certificate PEM file
environmentVariables.RNDS_CERT_KEY: Path to e-CNPJ private key PEM file (encrypted at rest)
